title: SmartStore Storage Basket with Handles in Blue 11.4L (36.5x27x15cm) | Plastic Storage Bin from Recycled Plastic | Essence L Storage Box fits A4 paper| Storage with 10-year Warranty
features: Design: The modern, airy design of our storage baskets ensures stylish organisation. Perfect for open shelves and cupboards – choose your favourite colours
Light & sturdy: The plastic storage basket is robust yet lightweight. Side handles make it easy to carry—ideal for kids' rooms, office, kitchen or bathroom.
Easy to clean: Simply wipe with a damp cloth—ideal for hygienic storage of cosmetics, toys, food, toiletries, or documents in all living areas. Perfect storage boxes for shelves.
Stackable: The plastic storage boxes nest inside each other when not in use, saving space. Keep organised and make efficient use of any room—ideal for small storage needs.
Quality: SmartStore offers a 10-year warranty and 30 years of expertise. Our storage basket boasts durable quality, functional design, and 11.4L capacity with 36.5x27x15cm dimensions.
